limitations: The conclusion is limited to repository-observable readiness.
Actual concurrent workspace enforcement, organization permissions, team behavior, and private SaaS configuration remain unknown.
Detected verification commands are not executed by the default read-only scan.
Generated AGENTS.md and Context Tree materials are review drafts; the scanner never writes them into the target repository.

dimensions.name: Instruction convergence
dimensions.rationale: 1 root and 1 scoped instruction sources; root has 8 commands and 8 boundary signals; 0 detected root conflicts.
dimensions.minimum_improvement: Keep one canonical root instruction source and use scoped files only for real local overrides.
unknowns: Whether every agent runtime actually loads the discovered instruction files is not observable from the repository.

dimensions.name: Task and workspace isolation
dimensions.rationale: 0 root-strong, 1 scoped-strong, 1 branch-only, and 0 unsafe isolation policy signals; 2 workspace manifests and 1 environment-isolation files.
dimensions.minimum_improvement: Add explicit port, credential, cache, and generated-output boundaries to the existing branch/worktree policy.
unknowns: Actual concurrent worktree, branch, credential, port, and temporary-state isolation is not observable from repository files alone.

dimensions.name: Code and domain ownership
dimensions.rationale: 1 actionable CODEOWNERS/OWNERS files with 1 rules, 0 ownership docs, and 15 instruction boundaries.
dimensions.minimum_improvement: Cover any unmapped high-risk, generated, migration, and release paths without imposing blanket per-file gating.
unknowns: Whether named owners are current, available, and required reviewers is not observable from static repository evidence.

dimensions.name: Shared decisions and context

dimensions.name: Repeatable verification

summary: Repo-level score 84/100 at 99% evidence coverage. Strong: Instruction convergence, Shared decisions and context, Repeatable verification, Handoff and definition of done. Constrained: none. 0 prioritized readiness fixes.
